description: Build SEOWidget React component for ARES dashboard. Display SEO metrics from Firestore 'seo_tool' collection with stats, trends, insights. Props: {seoData}. Export default.
requirements: Display SEO metrics: keywords tracked, backlinks, organic traffic, domain authority
Show trending keywords and performance indicators
Fetch data from Firestore 'seo_tool' collection using Firestore listeners
Display key metrics in grid or card layout with icons/badges
Color coding for trends: green (up), red (down), gray (neutral)
context: Reference AgentStatus.js for grid layout and metric display patterns. SEO schema: {keywords, backlinks, organicTraffic, domainAuthority, trends, lastUpdated}
